categories.title: Threat Intelligence

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-9082: Drupal Core actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.

briefings.title: CVE-2025-34291: Langflow Langflow actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Langflow contains an origin validation error vulnerability in which an overly permissive CORS configuration combined with a refresh token cookie configured as SameSite=None allows a malicious webpage to perform…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-34926: Trend Micro Apex One actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Trend Micro Apex One (on-premise) contains a directory traversal vulnerability that could allow a pre-authenticated local attacker to modify a key table on the server to inject malicious code to deploy to agents on…
